item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Black Mage's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned black mage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level black mage to 60 and complete all job quests up through “The Defiant Ones.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
